text: Whenever Allah's Messenger (#) was given the choice of one of two ‘matters, he would choose the casier of the two, as long as it was not sinful to do 50, but if it was sinful o do 5o, he would not approach it. Alah's Messenger (#) never took revenge (over anyboy) for his own sake but (he i) only when Allah’s Legal Bindings were outraged in which case he would take revenge for Allh's Sake. PP . Sahih al-Bukhari 3560
